compBuildings.buildingName: Overture 9th + CO 55+ Active Adult Apartment Homes

description:
This apartment home features a full-size kitchen complete with dishwasher and disposal, open living room, updated flooring and bathroom tile, in-unit AC, walk-in closets, and more. Building amenities highlight controlled building entry, reserved off street parking (subject to availability), on-site laundry room, smoke free property, and great proximity to Downtown, Cherry Creek, and Broadway. The Ogden Arms is managed by Alden Brown & Co., LLC.

Rental License Number: 2022-BFN-0008769

Applicant has the right to provide Alden Brown and Company with a Portable Tenant Screening Report (PTSR) that is not more than 60 days old, as defined in 38-12-902(2.5), Colorado Revised Statutes; and 2) if Applicant provides Alden Brown and Company with a PTSR, Alden Brown and Company is prohibited from: a) charging Applicant a rental application fee; or b) charging Applicant a fee for Alden Brown and Company to access or use the PTSR.
